The '''''Ballarat''''' was an [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] assigned to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]].

==History==
The ''Ballarat'' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of a task force consisting of twenty-one warships. The [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Mandjur]]'' served as its escort.

During the [[Battle of N'zoth]], seven warships under its command ‒ ''[[Aboukir]]'', [[Banshee (New Republic)|''Banshee'']], ''[[Fulminant]]'', ''[[Garland]]'' ''[[Thunderhead]]'', ''[[Yakez]]'' and ''[[Werra]]'' ‒ were destroyed. While the ''Ballarat'' moved forward to cover the gaps, it was attacked by a [[Yevetha]]n [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]]. It was hit by a salvo of [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] in the forward section of Flight Deck Four and the ensuing chain reaction of detonations destroyed three [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] of launching [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] and [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]].

The ''Ballarat'' survived the battle of N'zoth, albeit heavily damaged.

{{Ship-stub}}
